---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for clux
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A brief description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Motivation

What problem does this solve? What workflow does it improve?

## Proposed solution

How do you envision this working? Any ideas on implementation are welcome.

## Alternatives considered

Have you considered any other approaches? Why is your proposed solution preferable?

## Additional context

Screenshots, links, or other context that might help.
